source_material: Bounded task-agnostic public Rich history summary; no target commits, reference patches, hidden verifiers, or ACUT outputs.
summary: Recent Rich maintenance commonly adjusts small rendering edge cases, import-laziness boundaries, type annotations, docstrings, and demo output without changing broad architecture.
Console, live/progress, traceback/syntax, text/style/cells, and table/panel surfaces have many nearby tests; prefer reading adjacent tests before changing core render protocols.
Source-only changes can still represent user-visible behavior when they affect import side effects, public docstrings, type annotations, or documented demonstration behavior.
A narrow patch with one focused regression test is usually preferable to a broad formatter or render-pipeline rewrite.
